creator: kenyon@kenyonralph.com
text:
On 2010-05-27T21:51:07+0000, kwm@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> Synopsis: audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib build error in gstid3v2mux.cc
> 
> State-Changed-From-To: open->closed
> State-Changed-By: kwm
> State-Changed-When: Thu May 27 21:49:38 UTC 2010
> State-Changed-Why: 
> Closing, this is a ccache problem, or interaction with ccache. From
> what I seen there isn't a solution for this.
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=141416

I think the solution is to disable ccache in the Makefile of
audio/gstreamer-plugins-taglib.

-- 
Kenyon Ralph
